name: The Survivors
short_description: You crashed near a city infested by an unknown virus, you discover a world of nightmare infested with zombies but also by fanatics. Deliver yourself, craft, build and fight for your survival and the other survivors that populate this world in this survival game.
detailed_description:
Special Offer



10% discount at launch!!

it's the big day of the game's release,
I hope you will enjoy it.
I have new ideas that I will soon share with you concerning the extension of the map...
thank you all


Update Notes



Basement of buildings

on March 3, with the faction of the soldiers, I introduce the basements of the buildings.

I'm thinking of making about ten different ones, some with zombies and others with enemy npc's.

I introduce a currency in the game.

this will serve to develop trade between factions


Update Notes



New content coming soon


this content is already ready, it has been tested. on the part reserved for the army, I implemented construction quests, quests to eliminate mini bosses and a quest to send resources.

all this allows you to obtain experience for the purchase of 2 vehicles already ready and a third in progress, which will have an integrated stock.

I modified the map to include the entrance to 3 bunkers, I tested the possibility of a basement, and it works well.

so I should set up an underground map in the roadmap.

I fixed small bugs, but nothing major.
everything I put in place I test it ..... I play my own game !!
and my goal is to enjoy it ... I am at your disposal if you have any mission ideas, I can't wait to read your suggestions


About the Game


The survivors is a game in an open world populated by zombies and fanatical rebels but also survivors helped, craft and base bulding, missions are to be discovered

What Is the Survivors

Your transport plane has crashed you must survive the crash in a world populated by zombies and fanatics

Game Features

  • Discover A World Rich In Original Places

  • Fight Different Style Of Zombies

  • Fight Armed Fanatics

  • build its base, manage its electricity, its resources, recruit npc's which will produce building materials, ammunition, care
  • stop the proliferation of zombies by making traps
    • Collect figurines from this world to decorate your base
      • Meet other factions, complete helicopter rescue missions, reconstruction missions, delivery missions, deliver civilians, buy vehicles as rewards

      Gameplay Style

      it's An Survival Game Style.

      it's a deliberately arcade style, oriented on missions and action, and the discovery of the world, here you will only have few weapons in the often identical game play, no zombies to kill at 100m.

      Developpement : Road Map

      we plan to to add new vehicles and their improvements, zombie bosses, new missions and a trade system between factions....

      what to Enjoy
